title: Crush Syndrome
symptoms: Limb pinned under a heavy object (rubble, car) for more than 15-30 minutes
immediate_steps: If the object has been on the limb for LESS than 15 minutes, remove it immediately
If the object has been on the limb for MORE than a few hours, medical personnel may need to administer IV fluids BEFORE removing the object (removing it releases lethal toxins into the heart)
If you must remove it to save their life from other dangers (fire), apply a tourniquet above the crush injury BEFORE removing the weight if possible
avoid: Do not abruptly remove a heavy weight that has been pinning someone for hours unless strictly necessary for immediate survival
